about.content:
Hi, I'm Fernanda Benites, a software architect and engineering leader originally from Brazil and currently based in New Jersey.

I specialize in building scalable digital products and distributed systems, with a strong focus on frontend architecture, GraphQL, cloud platforms, and developer experience. Over the past decade, I have worked across web, mobile, and backend technologies, leading teams and helping organizations deliver high-quality software at scale.

Currently, I work on digital products for the automotive industry, where I help shape technical strategy, architecture, and engineering practices.

Outside of technology, I enjoy reading, photography, cycling, running, gardening, and spending time with my dog Agnes.
